folders.name: APP
folders.info:
## APP/

Mostly bash scripts used by the project `makefile`. Can also contain other scripts created during the course of the project, e.g. python snippets for use with Blender.

folders.name: BUILD
folders.info:
## BUILD/

Not tracked. Artifacts generated from software build or compilation processes, e.g. binaries, executables.

folders.name: DATA
folders.info:
## DATA/

Data files used in the project. CSV, geotiff, etc.

folders.name: DIST
folders.info:
## DIST/

Files ready for delivery or distribution, usually at the end of a scripted build process.

folders.name: DOC
folders.info:
## DOC/

Documentation, such as project management worksheets and mind-mapping files.

folders.name: FONT
folders.info:
## FONT/

Fonts used in the project.

folders.name: MATERIAL
folders.info:
## MATERIAL/

Material library for sharing between multiple models and scenes.

folders.name: MODEL
folders.info:
## MODEL/

3d models, appended or linked into scenes.

folders.name: PARKING_LOT
folders.info:
## PARKING\_LOT/

A temporary location to drop inspirational and informative material that may become an asset or `REFERENCE` later.

Files from various sources and types, such as previous projects, stock photos, models, or a random image search. Create an additional folder to identify the source. Locate licensed material to `<asset type>/.../LICENSED` (and document). Move files with no clear license to `REFERENCE/` -- and *use as reference only.*

Folder not version-controlled or part of a backup. Deleted at the end of the project.

folders.name: REFERENCE
folders.info:
## REFERENCE/

Files used for *reference only,* such as articles, rendering styles, typography. Files not usually renamed except to replace illegal characters. Create folders to help identify the source.

folders.name: RENDER
folders.info:
## RENDER/

Output from EDIT or COMP further organized by sequence/shot. Not tracked (version controlled) or synchronized. Use, e.g. `make ...mp4`, and `make dailies` to collect files for review.

Locate final renders to `DAILIES/`, `DIST/` or `DELIVERABLE/`.

folders.name: SCENE
folders.info:
## SCENE/

File used to link/append-in models, materials, textures, etc. and for rendering an image, animation, or build an interactive product.

folders.name: SCENE_GODOT
folders.info:
## SCENE_\[GODOT\]/

Godot game engine project for producing an interactive 3d experience. May contain an Godot-specific `.gitignore`. Parent folder should have updated `.gitattributes` for git lfs support.

Replace _GODOT_ with scene/sequence identifier.

First introduced during GLR/DMC.

folders.name: TEXTURE
folders.info:
## TEXTURE/

Texture maps and texture-generating project files.

Not yet used for Quixel Mixer _Project_ files -- see `MIXER_PROJECT` for that.

variables.name: deployfiles
variables.prompt: Enter deployfiles (folder that will contain your packaged builds):

variables.name: project_type
variables.prompt: Enter project_type (e.g. Blender, Godot, WebXR, etc.):
